_readme: Curated publisher whitelist -- the pipeline sources ONLY from these domains per sector. Keys MUST match config/sectors.json's sector names exactly (they differ from the original reference-doc sector names, e.g. 'Space and Science' -> 'Science & Space', 'Global Affairs' -> 'World News', 'Tech, Startup and AI' -> 'AI'). 'rss' is a confirmed-live direct feed URL (fetched directly, no Google News involved); when null, the publication is reached via a Google News query restricted to its domain(s) with site:. 'india_weight'/'genz_weight' (0-1) feed india_source_score/genz_source_score directly, bypassing config/source_lists.json's fuzzy name-matching entirely -- attribution here is by domain, not by trying to match Google's often-inconsistent <source> string. 'topic_scope': 'dedicated' (default, omitted) means everything this publication puts out belongs to its sector, so no relevance gate is applied; 'general' marks a multi-topic outlet included for its sector-relevant slice only -- those articles are dropped unless they match one of the sector's own keywords, since trusting the source alone let off-topic wire/general-news content (sports, politics, unrelated business) leak into sectors under weighted scoring alone.

Science & Space.name: Science (AAAS)
Science & Space.note: academic journal; feed pattern is known but returned 403 in testing

Science & Space.name: National Geographic
Science & Space.note: the tested feed path 404'd; an older feed URL is referenced online but unverified

Science & Space.name: BBC Earth
Science & Space.note: site was entirely unreachable in testing -- retest

Science & Space.name: ScienceDirect
Science & Space.note: literature-index platform aggregating many journals, not a single publisher -- no unified feed, expect near-zero yield

Science & Space.name: Advances in Space Research
Science & Space.note: academic journal, per-journal new-paper-alert feed, not news -- expect near-zero yield

Science & Space.name: Space: Science and Technology
Science & Space.note: academic journal (AAAS Science Partner Journal); feed pattern known but returned 403 in testing -- expect near-zero yield

Science & Space.name: PubMed
Science & Space.note: literature index, not a publisher -- robots.txt explicitly disallows /rss and /api; no fixed feed exists, expect near-zero yield

Science & Space.name: The New England Journal of Medicine
Science & Space.note: academic journal -- robots.txt explicitly disallows /rss; expect near-zero yield

Science & Space.name: National Medical Journal of India
Science & Space.note: academic journal, India-affiliated (AIIMS) but not a news outlet -- expect near-zero yield

World News.name: BBC News
World News.note: a general newsroom, not world-affairs-dedicated -- gated to its India-foreign-policy-relevant slice

World News.name: CNN
World News.note: main/edition domains returned 451 in testing; lite.cnn.com loaded fine but no RSS was confirmed live there. General newsroom -- gated to its India-foreign-policy-relevant slice

World News.name: Times of India
World News.note: ToI's own RSS terms explicitly forbid redistribution/aggregation of feed content -- deliberately not ingesting their feed directly even though a URL is discoverable; sourced via the Google News fallback only. General newsroom -- gated to its India-foreign-policy-relevant slice

World News.name: The Hindu
World News.note: domain was unreachable in testing (tool-level block); a feed URL is documented but unconfirmed -- retest before trusting. General newsroom -- gated to its India-foreign-policy-relevant slice

AI.name: Reuters
AI.note: Reuters discontinued its public RSS in 2020; no legitimate direct feed exists. A wire service covering everything, not AI-dedicated -- confirmed leaking off-topic content (UEFA, Coca-Cola IPO) into this sector; gated to its AI-relevant slice

AI.name: Taylor and Francis
AI.note: academic publisher, not a news outlet -- its only Google-News-indexed content is a separate 'Newsroom' PR sub-brand, expect near-zero yield

AI.name: Reuben Hassid (Substack)
AI.note: correct byline spelling is 'Ruben' -- individual AI newsletter, never appears in Google News under its own name

AI.name: Cybernetics and Systems Analysis
AI.note: academic journal (Springer); 'Cybernetics' alone is an ambiguous generic term, this is the closest-named journal -- expect near-zero yield, kept per explicit request

AI.name: Indian Journal of Science and Technology
AI.note: academic journal, not a news outlet -- expect near-zero yield

AI.name: Advances in Science and Technology Research Journal
AI.note: academic journal, not a news outlet -- expect near-zero yield

Money & Business.name: Wall Street Journal
Money & Business.note: feed is teaser-only (paywalled); the configured feed is WSJ's WORLD news feed, not business-specific -- gated to its business-relevant slice rather than swapping the feed

Money & Business.name: FinShorts
Money & Business.note: UNVERIFIED -- prior research could not find a site at this domain and suspects the intended outlet is Finshots (finshots.in), which does have a confirmed-live feed. Confirm which is correct before relying on this entry; domain kept as given rather than silently swapped.

Entertainment (Film/TV/Music).name: Indian Express
Entertainment (Film/TV/Music).note: a general newspaper, not entertainment-dedicated -- its full feed covers politics/business/crime too; gated to its entertainment-relevant slice

Entertainment (Film/TV/Music).name: PinkVilla
Entertainment (Film/TV/Music).note: public feed found is stale (frozen since May 2026) -- treated as no working direct feed

Entertainment (Film/TV/Music).name: Variety
Entertainment (Film/TV/Music).note: site + feed both gated behind a Tollbit paywall (402) as of testing

Entertainment (Film/TV/Music).name: DeuxMoi
Entertainment (Film/TV/Music).note: gossip/rumor outlet, not a newsroom -- crowdsourced unverified 'sightings' by its own disclaimer; weighted low deliberately

Entertainment (Film/TV/Music).name: Pitchfork
Entertainment (Film/TV/Music).note: direct-feed liveness was inconclusive in testing (tool-level block); retest before assuming it's actually dead

Entertainment (Film/TV/Music).name: Billboard
Entertainment (Film/TV/Music).note: site + feed both gated behind the same Tollbit paywall as Variety (402)

Entertainment (Film/TV/Music).name: Paste Magazine
Entertainment (Film/TV/Music).note: homepage and /feed both 403 -- likely WAF/bot-detection rather than a real policy block

Fashion & Beauty.name: Delhi Times
Fashion & Beauty.note: shares a domain with Bombay Times and the main Times of India paper -- Google News cannot distinguish the city supplement from the parent paper by URL path alone. Confirmed leaking unrelated general ToI content (e.g. an Apple pricing story); gated to its fashion-relevant slice

Fashion & Beauty.name: Bombay Times
Fashion & Beauty.note: see Delhi Times note -- same domain overlap and same gating

Fashion & Beauty.name: Architectural Digest
Fashion & Beauty.note: direct RSS is the global edition feed only; architecturaldigest.in (India edition) is included in the site: fallback restriction but has no separately confirmed feed
